assessor_raw: TFT vs. gradient boosting load forecasting: rigorous rolling-origin evaluation protocol. Actual forecast weather inputs correctly prevent lookahead bias. Both models receive identical features with interaction terms provided to gradient boosting for fairness. Bayesian optimization with equal budget ensures fair tuning. MAE is standard for load forecasting. Secondary metrics cover seasonal variation, peak performance, and uncertainty. Scope appropriately bounded to this grid operator. Verdict: defense_wins.
